chapter_title.en: The meaning of a neighbor and the limit of neighboring

text: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد الله، عن أبيه، عن محمد بن أبي عمير، عن معاوية بن عمار، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: قلت له: جعلت فداك، ما حد الجار؟ قال: أربعين دارا من كل جانب.

en.basel-kadem: 1.	My father, may Allah grant him mercy, said: We were told by Sa’d bin Abdullah, from Ahmad bin Abi Abdillah, from his father, from Muhammed bin Abi ‘Umayr, from Mu’awiya bin Ammar, from Abu Abdillah, peace be upon him, that he said: I said to him: May I be sacrificed for you, what is the limit of a neighbor? He said: Forty houses from every side.
